CVE-2018-19211.title: In ncurses 6.1, there is a NULL pointer dereference at function _ ...
CVE-2018-19211.description: In ncurses 6.1, there is a NULL pointer dereference at function _nc_parse_entry in parse_entry.c that will lead to a denial of service attack. The product proceeds to the dereference code path even after a "dubious character `*' in name or alias field" detection.
